title: D-FantiX 3D Puffy Stickers for Toddlers 2-4 Years, Reusable Sticker Books for Girls Ages 4-8, Dress-Up, Princess, Mermaid, Pet, Car Road Trip Activities for Kids 3-5, Airplane Travel Essentials
features: Puffy Sticker Activity Book Set: Unlock Endless Sticker Fun! Dive into Fashion Dress-Up, Princess, Mermaid, and Pet themes with this super-value reusable sticker book set. Each puffy sticker activity book bursts with 65+ soft, cute puffy stickers (260+ total!) designed for tiny hands to stick, peel, and reposition endlessly

Safe & Mess-Free: These soft reusable puffy stickers peel effortlessly off any smooth surface (water bottle, windows, mirrors, fridges) leaving zero sticky residue. Crafted from non-toxic, skin-safe, waterproof, and odorless material for complete peace of mind. Kids adore the tactile, bulging textures, while parents love the mess-free, reusable fun

Portable & Easy to Carry: Our travel sticker books feature a perfectly sized child's handle for easy carrying. Compact, lightweight & mess-free, they deliver hours of quiet, screen-free play – ideal for planes, trains, road trips, restaurants, camping, or waiting rooms. Enjoy peace of mind with this essential travel toys that fits in any bag

Spark Creativity & Skills: These immersive sticker scenes boost fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and concentration with fun, puffy 3D stickers. Encourage storytelling, creative expression, and calm independence while reducing screen time. Perfect for home, classrooms, or travel

Great Gifts for Toddlers & Kids: Parents and kids adore our vibrant reusable puffy sticker book. Perfect for birthdays, Christmas, holidays, party favors, travel, or classroom rewards. An ideal gift that brings surprise, creativity, and hours of screen-free play. Loved for Children's Day, summer vacation, preschool, kindergarten, and homeschool learning
description: Product Description Unlock Imagination with D-FantiX 3D puffy sticker books! Every tactile 3D sticker bursts with HD textures to spark curiosity Why Parents & Kids Love It: Multi-Themed Exploration: Sparks curiosity about fashion dress-up, princess, mermaid, and pet friends Reusable & Durable: High-quality puffy material withstands playful hands Portable Creativity: Fosters artistic expression and storytelling anywhere Mess-Free Fun: Easy cleanup – no residue or tears Teacher-Designed Screen-Free Learning! Develop fine motor skills, creativity & focus with reusable puffy sticker books co-created by educators: ✓ Build hand-eye coordination ✓ Foster calm, independent play ✓ Encourage independent storytelling ✓ Reduce screen time Puffy Material Highlights: ✓ Advanced Texture: Bulging 3D effects, ultra-soft tactile feel ✓ Premium Safety: Skin-safe vinyl, non-toxic, odorless ✓ Performance: Waterproof, reusable, residue-free peeling ✓ Versatility: Bonds securely to all smooth surfaces ✓ Visual Impact: Vibrant stickers leap to life (vs. flat traditional stickers) Travel-Ready Fun! Child-sized handle + compact design makes this the ultimate road trip, airplane, or restaurant activity. Transform travel or home into skill-building adventures – watch minds grow as tiny hands create endlessly reusable worlds!
